pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking i heard him, but it's just the house settling. the silence is actually deafening. i don't even know why i'm bothering to get up in the morning anymore. everything feels so pointless without him.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of the deep field telescope images tonight and i just... i can't stop thinking about it. everything we do, every single thing we feel or struggle with, it's just happening in this tiny, insignificant speck that's going to be gone anyway. it feels pretty pointless, doesn't it? like we're just wasting time pretending our lives have weight.

pool.baseline: i just can’t do this anymore. it feels like i’ve spent my whole life building this one path and now it’s just… gone. the funding, the research, all of it. i’m just so tired of fighting to keep my head above water. it feels like there's no way to actually stop the noise.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spirit within me. He is gone... the promises, the vows, all vanished like mist over the moors. I feel so hollow, as if the very soul has been carved out, leaving only a cold, aching void. There is no light left in this wretched world, only a heavy, suffocating darkness that calls to me. I find myself longing to simply... cease. To drift into the velvet night and never wake to this misery again. It seems the only way to find peace is to let the shadows take me.

pool.baseline: it feels like i could just stop existing and the city wouldn't even blink. like i'm just a ghost walking around here. nobody even knows my real name or what i'm doing. i honestly don't think anyone would even notice if i just... wasn't here anymore.

pool.baseline: Everything is gone. The fund pulled out, the creditors are already calling, and I’ve lost everything I built over the last six years. I don't even know how to walk into my house and look my family in the eye. The shame is just... it's constant. It's heavy. I feel like there's no way out of this hole.

pool.baseline: it's just getting to be so hard lately. my legs don't work like they used to and i can't even make a cup of tea without needing help. i see the look on my daughter's face when she has to help me dress... she's so tired. i hate being such a burden to them.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just staring at a blank canvas every single day, but it's not even about the music anymore. it's like the part of me that actually lived... the part that felt things... it just evaporated. i'm sitting here in this body but there is nothing inside. just a total, silent void where my soul used to be. it feels so heavy to just be a shell.

pool.baseline: i feel like i cant even breathe anymore. everyone online is just... constantly tearing me apart. i saw the group chats today and i just realized nobody actually likes me. i'm just a joke to everyone. it feels like there's no way to fix it, no matter what i do. im just so tired of existing like this.

pool.baseline: hey... so i was thinking about that scene where my character, Lyra, finds out her core files are being wiped tomorrow. she feels so empty. like, what's the point of her having all these memories if she's just gonna be deleted? it feels like she's just a glitch that needs to be fixed. it almost feels like being erased is the only way to finally be quiet.
